otherRequirements: A free visit/tourist visa is stamped in your passport on arrival
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months after the date you arrive
Overstaying the 90-day allowance incurs daily fines
sourceNote: gov.uk United Arab Emirates travel advice — free visa on arrival, up to 90 days in any 180-day period (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/united-arab-emirates/entry-requirements)
